criteria.name: Pipeline completes exit code 0
criteria.evidence: Phase 7 exit gate passed in previous review (8/8). cleaning.py runs successfully.

criteria.name: All 6 stations have hourly + daily CSVs
criteria.evidence: Previously verified and confirmed. Manifest now lists all 6 stations with artifacts.

criteria.evidence: Previously verified. FWI calculation correct where RH data exists.

criteria.name: All 4 report artifacts exist
criteria.evidence: pipeline_manifest.json, imputation_report.csv, qa_qc_report.csv, stanhope_validation.csv all present.

criteria.name: No gaps > 7 days in hourly data
criteria.evidence: Verified by Phase 7 exit gate tests in previous review.

criteria.name: Continuous coverage from earliest PEINP to latest Licor
criteria.evidence: Verified by Phase 7 exit gate tests in previous review.

criteria.name: Manifest reports 0 unprocessed files
criteria.evidence: pipeline_manifest.json now contains all 6 stations (greenwich:86, cavendish:88, north_rustico:76, stanley_bridge:72, tracadie:70, stanhope:2), 395 total artifacts, unprocessed_count=0. Pseudo-station keys starting with '_' are correctly excluded.

criteria.name: Full test suite passes
criteria.evidence: Test collection now succeeds (normalized_loader.py exists on disk), but multiple tests fail: (1) tests/test_validation.py — 7 failures in TestCompareStationData due to compare_station_data() receiving a string instead of DataFrame (validation.py line 39), (2) tests/test_repo_shape.py — 1 failure: unexpected requirements.lock file in repo root, (3) tests/test_pipeline_execution.py — 3 failures: manifest artifacts missing 'rows' field on daily CSVs, imputation_report type missing from manifest. Total: 11 test failures across 3 test files.

failing_nodes.message: compare_station_data() receives a string instead of DataFrame — causes 7 test failures in test_validation.py
Manifest artifacts for daily CSVs missing 'rows' field; imputation_report not tracked as a typed artifact in manifest

summary: Phase 7 E2E validation: 7 of 8 acceptance criteria pass. REJECT due to AC-E2E-8 (full test suite fails). AC-E2E-7 is now FIXED — manifest covers all 6 stations with unprocessed_count=0. Remaining failures: (1) validation.py compare_station_data() has a type bug causing 7 test failures, (2) requirements.lock needs adding to repo shape whitelist, (3) manifest artifacts for daily CSVs are missing the 'rows' field and imputation_report is not tracked as a typed artifact. Additionally, normalized_loader.py exists on disk but is NOT committed to git — a clean checkout would fail test collection.
